content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Review found one correctness gap: the production terminal review reconciliation path still bypasses the new parsimonious existing-bead lookup. `nix build`, `nix develop -c cargo test --features test-stub`, `nix develop -c cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, and `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` passed.

## Amendments

1. `src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1575`-`1714` still routes terminal `propose_new_bead` findings by grouping summaries and appending `proposed-beads.ndjson`; it never runs the new open-bead similarity lookup or downgrades to `covered_by_existing_bead`. The production entrypoint calls this path directly at `src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1780`, so an accepted final-review proposal with a strong existing open bead match will still be surfaced as a new bead proposal once the threshold is met. This bypasses the parsimonious policy implemented in `handle_propose_new_bead` and can create duplicate follow-up work from the real reconciliation flow.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: The current branch hardens the service helper but leaves the terminal reconciliation path that processes persisted review/final-review classifications without the required existing-bead ownership check.
